ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.LastName <> $Label.DataArchiverUser, NOT( OR( RecordType.Name = "CCS Case", RecordType.Name = "CCS Dividend", RecordType.Name = "Canaccede EmailToCase", RecordType.Name = "EmailToCase", RecordType.Name = "Insolvency Canadian Tire Community Case", RecordType.Name = "Insolvency Case", RecordType.Name = "Insolvency Fairstone Community Case", RecordType.Name = "Insolvency Flexiti Community Case", RecordType.Name = "Insolvency Money Mart Community Case", RecordType.Name = "Insolvency SDA Community Case", RecordType.Name = "Insolvency SPL Community Case", RecordType.Name = "Insolvency Scotia Community Case", RecordType.Name = "Remittance", RecordType.Name = "Web To Case", AND(RecordType.Name = "Flexiti CCS Case", $Profile.Name <> "Flexiti Community User"), AND(RecordType.Name = "CCS Case", $Profile.Name <> "Goeasy Community User") ) ), OR( AND(RecordType.Name = "Flexiti CCS Case", $Profile.Name <> "Flexiti Community User"), AND(RecordType.Name = "CCS Case", $Profile.Name <> "Goeasy Community User"), AND(RecordType.Name = "Flexiti CCS Case", $Profile.Name = "Flexiti Community User", FALSE), AND(RecordType.Name = "CCS Case", $Profile.Name = "Goeasy Community User", FALSE), AND(RecordType.Name = "CCS Case", $Profile.Name <> "Goeasy Community User"), ISBLANK(CCS_Account__c) ) )
